title: Pirates remain unbeaten in SWD Promotion League
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - Pirates United (132/7) maintained their unbeaten record in the SWDC Promotion League with a three-wicket victory against George B.


> In the other promotion league fixture last weekend, NMU Madibaz (196 all out) defeated Riversdale (144 all out) by 152 runs.


The log positions of the top four teams in the promotion league are:

1st - Pirates United (20 points after four matches)

2nd - Mossel Bay (10 points after three matches)

3rd - Plett Pioneers (10 points after three matches)

4th - NMU Madibaz (10 points after four matches)

See the summarised scorecards for the weekend at www.georgeherald.com.

The summarised scorecards for the weekend are:

Promotion League

Riversdale vs NMU Madibaz George

NMU Madibaz George 296 all out (41.2 overs); Riversdale 144 (32.5 overs)

NMU Madibaz George won by 152 runs.

George B vs Pirates United A

George B 131 all out (32.2 overs); Pirates United A 132/7 (28.3 overs)

Pirates United won by 3 wickets.

Reserve division 1:

Harlequins Forces C vs Beaufort West A

Harlequins Forces C 229 all out (38.2 overs)

Beaufort West A 205 all out (40.1 overs)

Harlequins Forces C won by 24 runs.

Union Stars B vs Bongolethu A

Bongolethu A 81 all out (22.2 overs); Union Stars B 82/0 (10.4 overs)

Union Stars B won by 10 wickets.

Western Hope vs KwaNonqaba

Western Hope 250 all out (38.4 overs); KwaNonqaba 80 all out (27.1 overs)

Western Hope won by 170 runs.

Hartenbos vs Melkhoutfontein

Melkhoutfontein 255 all out (36 overs); Hartenbos 111 all out (22.1 overs)

Melkhoutfontein won by 144 runs.

Reserve division 2:

New Dawn Park C vs Pacaltsdorp United C

Pacaltsdorp United C 247 all out (40 overs)

New Dawn Park C 71 all out (21 overs)

Pacaltsdorp United C won by 176 runs.

Hartenbos B vs Ramblers B

Hartenbos B 204/8 (31 overs); Ramblers B 206/3 (28.5 overs)

Ramblers B won by 7 wickets.

Sussex B vs Mossel Bay B

Sussex B 177 all out (31.2 overs); Mossel Bay B 110 all out (26.1 overs)

Sussex B won by 67 runs.

Plett Pioneers C vs Knysna Cavaliers C

Plett Pioneers C 95 all out (20.2 overs)

Knysna Cavaliers C 99/5 (14.5 overs)

Knysna Cavaliers C won by 5 wickets.

Pirates United B vs Knysna Cavaliers B

Pirates United B 95 all out (28.2 overs)

Knysna Cavaliers B 96/2 (14.4 overs)

Knysna Cavaliers B won by 8 wickets.

Harlequins Forces B vs Calitzdorp Young Stars A

Harlequins Forces B 89 all out (23.4 overs)

Calitzdorp Young Stars A 93/4 (15.4 overs)

Calitzdorp Young Stars A won by 6 wickets.

Pacaltsdorp United C vs George D

Match abandoned

George C vs Sussex C

Match abandoned

Western Hope B vs Beaufort West B

No result

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
